business_ideas.idea: AI phone sales agent to immediately qualify and pitch leads, eliminating call booking delays
AI therapist app, trained on therapy transcripts, offers affordable therapy at $5-10/month
Export warehouse automation robots to SMBs, similar to Amazon's Kiva system for all businesses
AI-specific consulting practice for verticals, or AI for X conferences with content and coaching
Digital likeness rights platform for celebrities, licensing voice/face for ads via proper permissions
Deepfake detection and monitoring service to protect celebrities from non-consensual media
AI tutors that personalize learning, adapt pace, explain concepts, quiz, track mastery online
AI accent removal for offshore customer service to improve NPS and customer satisfaction
AI-generated adult content for infinite personalization, lower costs, ethical production
AI agents that auto-generate and execute to-do lists based on stated goals, self-driving to-do lists

predictions.text: AI will be the intelligence wave creating trillions in value like information, communication, value waves
AI agents will become foundational infrastructure like the information superhighway
Work will increasingly be done by AI; humans will state goals and AI executes multi-step processes
